description: This Java class `LoanApplicationDraftService` provides business logic for handling loan application drafts, including creating, reading, updating, patching sections, running risk decisions, and deleting drafts. It interacts with a repository, processes JSON data, and manages draft states within a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftService
classes.description: A service class managing loan application drafts, including CRUD operations, patching sections, risk decisioning, and validation.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan draft for a user with provided data and optional section status.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft owned by a user by draft ID.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts for a user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Performs a full update (replace) of a draft, validating version and JSON structure.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within a draft by merging JSON objects and statuses.

methods.name: runDecisioning
methods.description: Calculates risk score and decision for a draft, and updates the draft accordingly.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a specified draft owned by a user.
